# Business Flow (end-to-end)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  Lead[Lead / Enquiry] --> C[Contact]
  C --> CC[CompanyContact]
  Co[Company] --> CC

  C --> R[Requirement]
  Co --> R

  A[Activity on Asset] --> M[Match]
  R --> M

  M --> O[Offer]
  O --> T[Tenancy]
  T --> PM[Property Management / Ongoing Ops]
```

## What this means in plain terms:

* People and organizations are captured as Contacts and Companies.
* Demand is captured as Requirements.
* Supply is captured as Activities on an Asset (usually a Property).
* Matching links demand and supply.
* Negotiation is captured as Offers.
* A successful offer transitions into a Tenancy.
* Then ongoing management continues through tenancy lifecycle records.

## Core Domain Map (simplified)


```{mermaid}

classDiagram
  class Asset
  class Property
  class Portfolio
  class Activity
  class Requirement
  class Match
  class Offer
  class Tenancy
  class Contact
  class Company
  class Address
  class User
  class Department
  class Business

  Asset <|-- Property
  Asset <|-- Portfolio
  Portfolio "1" --> "many" Property
  Property "1" --> "1" Address

  Asset "1" --> "many" Activity
  Asset "1" --> "many" Tenancy

  Activity "1" --> "many" Offer
  Requirement "1" --> "many" Offer

  Activity "1" --> "many" Match
  Requirement "1" --> "many" Match

  Tenancy "many" --> "1" Asset
  Tenancy "many" --> "0..1" Activity
  Tenancy "many" --> "0..1" Requirement
  Tenancy "0..many" --> "0..1" Tenancy : head/sub-lease

  Contact "many" --> "many" Company : via CompanyContact
  Contact "many" --> "many" Address : via ContactAddress
  Company "many" --> "many" Address : via CompanyAddress

  User "many" --> "1" Department
  User "many" --> "1" Business
```  

Highest-value relationships to remember

* Requirement ↔ Activity is many-to-many (through Match).
* Offer can be tied to Requirement and/or Activity, and optionally Property.
* Tenancy is the transactional anchor linked to Asset, and sometimes back to Requirement/Activity.
* Contact and Company are many-to-many via CompanyContact.
* Address is shared via link entities (not hard-wired only to one type).
